top_signals.title: Trump endorses ‘Maga warrior’ Ken Paxton in Texas Senate run-off
top_signals.summary: President’s tapping of controversial candidate could give Democrats an opening in November’s midterm elections
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World awaits new Fed chair’s vision on independence
top_signals.summary: Incoming Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh raised eyebrows by implying that outside monetary policy, the Fed should closely work with the presidential administration and Congress.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kokusai Electric Shares Drop as KKR Offloads Its Entire Stake
top_signals.summary: Kokusai Electric Corp. shares dropped after saying its biggest holder KKR & Co. is offloading its entire 10.6% stake in the Japanese supplier of chipmaking gear.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australia’s Beach Energy Sees M&A Potential on Domestic Gas Plan
top_signals.summary: Australia’s Beach Energy Ltd. believes it’s a more attractive acquisition target due to a government plan to force gas producers to keep a portion of their sales at home.

top_signals.title: Japan’s Mythos response ’must involve Big Tech,’ says LDP cybersecurity chief
top_signals.summary: Anthropic allows only a limited number of companies and groups to access the AI model given the risks it poses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CFTC sues Minnesota over first explicit state ban on prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Minnesota’s law could expose exchanges, payment providers, media partners, and sports leagues to criminal liability.
